title: mabrya geniculata subsp. flaviflora
intro: Mabrya geniculata subsp. flaviflora, also known as yellow-flowered Mabrya, is a plant species in the Loganiaceae family native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Mabrya geniculata subsp. flaviflora can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing the plant's extract with other herbal remedies.
